title: How to Choose a Photo and Video Team for Outdoor Amphitheater Events in Florida
excerpt: Outdoor amphitheater production is its own category of challenge. Here's what to look for when evaluating production partners for outdoor venue work in Florida.
author: diego-cerquera

content.alt: Wide shot of outdoor amphitheater crowd and stage
content.caption: Outdoor venues present unique challenges for audio, lighting, and weather
